specs.description: OpenRouter registered as provider in inference-gateway WASM module
specs.given: An inference_provider row with provider_id='openrouter' exists
specs.when: request_inference is called with provider='openrouter' and model='meta-llama/llama-4-maverick'
specs.then: Request is queued with status='queued'; budget validated; rate limit checked against openrouter provider row

specs.description: OpenRouter-specific headers included in outbound requests
specs.given: hex-nexus picks up a queued inference_request for provider='openrouter'
specs.then: Request includes headers: Authorization (Bearer key), HTTP-Referer (project URL), X-Title ('hex-agent')

specs.description: OpenRouter actual cost extracted from response
specs.given: OpenRouter returns a chat completion response with usage.cost field
specs.then: The cost_usd field uses the OpenRouter-reported cost, not a token×rate calculation

specs.given: OPENROUTER_API_KEY is set in secrets vault
specs.when: hex inference discover --provider openrouter is executed
specs.then: inference_provider table is populated with models from OpenRouter /api/v1/models endpoint; each row has model_id, context_window, pricing, and capabilities

specs.given: A batch-classified inference request with model='auto'
specs.when: OpenRouter provider is healthy and budget allows
specs.then: Request routes to OpenRouter with route='fallback' body extension; falls back to MiniMax if OpenRouter unavailable

specs.description: RL model selection includes OpenRouter models
specs.given: RL engine receives a reward signal for a completed task
specs.then: Reward updates the Q-value for that model; actual cost from OpenRouter response is used in cost-efficiency component

specs.description: Secret management via hex secrets vault
specs.given: User runs hex secrets set OPENROUTER_API_KEY sk-or-...
specs.when: An OpenRouter inference request is processed
specs.then: hex-nexus retrieves the key from secrets vault; key is never logged or included in SpacetimeDB tables

specs.description: OpenRouter provider preferences passed in request body
specs.when: Provider preferences are configured (order, allow, deny lists)
specs.then: Request body includes provider.order/allow/deny fields; transforms=['middle-out'] for context >100K tokens

specs.description: Dashboard shows OpenRouter models and per-request cost
specs.given: Inference panel is rendering completed requests
specs.then: Model column shows full model ID (e.g. meta-llama/llama-4-maverick); cost column shows actual cost from OpenRouter; provider column shows 'OpenRouter' badge

specs.description: Budget enforcement uses OpenRouter actual cost
specs.given: An agent has budget_usd=1.00 and has used $0.95
specs.when: An OpenRouter request returns with usage.cost=$0.10
specs.then: Budget is updated to $1.05 used; next request is rejected with 'budget_exceeded'

specs.description: Rate limit tracking per OpenRouter model
specs.when: 61st request in a minute is submitted
specs.then: Request is rejected with 'rate_limit_exceeded'; current_rpm counter accurate
Endpoint appears with provider='openrouter'; healthCheck validates connectivity to openrouter.ai/api/v1/models
